entry.title: Re: No set asset dummy in settlement rule in AuC PM order...

Hi Ali,
I think your FI configuration is not completely defined, which is why the system can't create a fixed asset.

entry.title: SAP Asset Manager - .aar extensions source code
entry.content: I have built the SAP Asset Manager mobile application in Visual Studio Code. Most of the code is Javascript + Typescipt. But some of the extensions use .aar libraries. I am interested in the extension "extension-MapFramework" and its library extension-MapFramework\plugin\Plugin-MapFramework\platforms\android\map-release.aar. I have downloaded these files from SAP Software Downloads. I am looking for the source code (android project) of the map-release.aar. I have tried to decompile the lib, but I am facing some errors (lost code) by decompiling.

entry.title: Re: Module suggestion
entry.content:
Hi Kanak,

 

this depends on what you want to learn? Something about finance and controlling, seomthing about human resource, and so on.

 

In general, you find all learnings here in the learning hub: https://learninghub.sap.com/

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: Assign a user to the cell in SAP SAC
entry.content: Hi, cell commenting seems the appropriate solution based on your description. Could you please explain why you can't use cell commenting?

entry.title: Re: Unable to run a query with secondary database in capm
entry.content:
Hi @c_chowdary,

1) Please update your CDS installation to the latest before continuing to avoid known bugs

2) You must specify the credentials for the secondary database as automatic credentials lookup is only implemented for the primary database 'db'.

I believe this works this way because CAP doesn't expect you to use two HANA databases at the same time.

{"cds":{
  "requires": {
    "db": {
      "kind": "hana",
      "vcap": {
        "name": <primary-database>
      }
    },
    "secondary-database": {
      "kind": "hana",
      "credentials": {
        "url": "..."
         ....
      }
    }
  }
}}

However, I don't really quite get the need to access multiple Hana Database Tenants on a single application.

Usually you have a single database tenant running on BTP and CAP will actually access an HDI container.

AND, an HDI container, when properly configured with SYNONYMS and GRANTS, is able to make cross container access:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/working-with-cross-hdi-container-access-scenarios-in-sap-hana-cloud/ba-p/13539139

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/cross-hdi-container-access-using-user-provided-service-for-containers/ba-p/13540097

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-access-cross-container-schema.html

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Re: Putaway Process - Put 1 or more HUs in a Final bin
entry.content:
Hi,

first of all: capacity in which way? Weight? Volume? Number of HUs?

second question: what is the storage behaviour and the putaway rule of your storage type?

third question: do you really mean "addition to stock"? Which means that it is the same material with the same stock information? Or do you want to have a mixed storage? Different material in the different HUs?

Brgds

Juergen

 

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Parts Interchangeability in SAP S/4 Hana public cloud.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We need your expertise help about the below subjected query.
1) Is there any way to implement MPN MRP set in SAP S/4 Hana public cloud.
2) If yes, could you please share with us sap knowledge article and helping document.
3) One example is RM-A and RM-B are both Black Iron Oxide that are used interchangeably but one is stronger than the other so they have different lb/ton loadings.  The BOM will have to be changed if we want MRP to keep track of each.

Thanks & Regards,
Ankit Kumar

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning: attach pdf document in comments
entry.content:
Hi, 

You can't attach PDF file in comments. You can upload the PDF file to "Files", and add the link in comment. 

Sarau

entry.title: Re: Onboarding 2.0_External candidates unable to reset th...
entry.content:
Please follow the KBA: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3069705

To Enable Forgot Password option in the login page, please follow the below mentioned steps

    1. Kindly go to Admin Centre
    2. Search for Email Notification Templates Settings
    3. Enable Reset Password Support Notification
    4. Click on Save Notification Settings
    5. You may refer to the this link for more details on how to reset the password : https://help.sap.com/viewer/534356acc0ab4b0e8977ebfb2eb432f7/2105/en-US/26209628db9f4f528d128b4f5a855c73.html
  • Reset User Password through the Admin, please follow the below mentioned steps: 
    1. Search for "Reset User Password" 
    2. Select "Reset individual user password (with supplied password)"
    3. Find: External Users from Onboarding and/or Learning (if enabled)
    4. Search with the First Name, Last Name or the Employee code of the candidate
    5. Set New Password for the candidate

entry.title: Are there plans to update the Spring framework within Crystal Reports
entry.content: Are there plans to update the Spring framework within Crystal Reports to mitigate CVE-2022-2296?  The software is continually flagged by scanning systems to be vulnerable to this CVE especially if Java 9+ is installed on the system that CR 2020 is installed on.

entry.title: SAP B1 TLS Version
entry.content:
Planning to upgrade from TLS 1.2 > TLS 1.3 and was wondering if this will cause any issues with SAP B1?

We are using SAP Business One 9.3 version for SAP HANA (9.30.140).

entry.title: ILX Learning Admin Proxy as same view as learner?
entry.content:
With the new ILX, when will learning admins be able to see the view employees are on via proxy?  Right now we can’t access their view on the new ILX if they have turned on that toggle (off is our default, but we hope to default to ON in the 1H release).

@janeholbrook @KevinMcDougall

entry.title: How to process bulk quantity purchase order if the material is dynamic in nature.
entry.content:
We faced a scenario where we placed an order with a vendor for 700,000 pieces, with each piece costing Rs. 1870.

However, our challenge lies in the dynamic nature of the materials for each delivery. For instance, the vendor supplied 100,000 shirts with prints on the front for the first delivery, necessitating a material code change.

Subsequently, for the second delivery of 20,000 shirts with prints on the back, another material code change was required.

Additionally, we provided packaging materials, such as poly bags and zip cards, from our inventory to the vendor. Each poly bag and zip card costs Rs. 10, increasing the final material cost to Rs. 1890 per piece.

Furthermore, the vendor requested a 20% advance against the purchase order.

How can we address these challenges within SAP?

Summary: We have Only Vendor, Rate and Qty and material is not confirm. 

Now our requirement is that how can fulfil in one purchase order.

Please let me know how we can achieve this.

Thanks.

entry.title: SAP Data services
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are currently using SAP Data services 4.2 SP 14 Patch 5 and OS RHEL 7.9

Since RHEL 7.9 will end on 30th June, upgrading the OS to RHEL 8.9.

My question is will SAP Data services 4.2 SP 14 Patch 5 work on RHEL 8.9

Please provide your inputs 

Thank you

Thanks

entry.title: Test ODBC with powershell
entry.content:
Hello,

Does anyone knows the proper way to test Advantage ODBC from windows powershell???

I tried below:

$connection = New-Object System.Data.Odbc.OdbcConnection("DSN=TestConnection") $connection.Open()

But Im getting this error:

Exception calling "Open" with "0" argument(s): "ERROR [IM014] [Microsoft][ODBC Driver Manager] The specified DSN contains an architecture mismatch between the Driver and
Application"
At line:2 char:1
+ $connection.Open()
+ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
+ CategoryInfo : NotSpecified: (:) [], MethodInvocationException
+ FullyQualifiedErrorId : OdbcException

Any advice will be great.

Thanks!

entry.title: HANA Express Download links Broken
entry.content:
It seems that the link for HANA Express Download is broken.

https://www.sap.com/cmp/td/sap-hana-express-edition.html

entry.title: Re: Unable to fetch Distinct values into the For loop in...
entry.content:
@RobertWaywell 

I ran the SQL outside and I am getting 10 results. But anyway, I found that my logic is incorrect. 

When using CURSOR, we shouldn't (no need) use OPEN, FETCH commands. Achieved the logic by below procedure. 

 

 

 

CREATE PROCEDURE DBADMIN.FetchDistinctStrings(IN DAYS INT)
LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
AS
BEGIN
        DECLARE STRING1 VARCHAR(255);
        DECLARE CURSOR MyTenIDFetch (STRING1 VARCHAR(255)) FOR
        SELECT DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_NAMES FROM "H_CPO_MAIN"."TABLE_NURO";
        FOR CUR_ROW AS MyTenIDFetch(STRING1) DO
        SELECT :CUR_ROW.STRING1 as STRING_NAMES FROM DUMMY;
        END FOR;
END;

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility question
entry.content: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility question with a new managed tag subscription

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow for Maintenance in S/4 HANA
entry.content: Use App Manage Work flow for Asset Management / maintenance order

entry.title: can S-user List report be modified?
entry.content: Can the Default report under Users&Contacts be modified? Example, currently it is not showing the additional note I add during the s-user creation (it comes as X), is it possible to modify the default report?

entry.title: Picking sin colocar numeros de serie
entry.content:
Saludos comunidad, hay alguna manera de configurar picking y embalaje para que con articulos gestionados por numero de serie, no pida seleccionar los numeros de serie al momento de liberar las lineas para picking?

Agradeciendo su respuesta

entry.content:

Thanks,

Brian.

@Margit_Wagner or @Andre_Fischer some update? 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 TLS Version
entry.content:
Hi sdali67,

SAP Business One only supports TLS version 1.2 and 1.3.

TLS versions 1.0 and 1.1 were disabled.

Refer to SAP Note 3165452 for the same.

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Replace a Model in the Optimized (Unified) Experience
entry.content:
Hi Tunir,

Thanks for this very useful blog, while waiting for the formal feature for this need coming in Q2.
We have followed all instructions, without errors during the process,  BUT, when opening the story we are experiencing some errors in most part of the widgets due to an inconsistence in CALMONTH dimension  (which is the only dimension associated to the FACT table within the analytical model, and is under the same space as the model itself).
This dimension is shown in the edition mode with a red warning symbol, i.e. no correctly referenced or defined.  (no warning nor errors in the original version).

Source model in datasphere side (the new one to where the story was repointed) is consistent and working fine in general and in CALMONTH dimension as well.

Any clue or advice on what could be happening and how to solve it?

Would really appreciate your help-. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Upgrade SAP B1 v10 2208 to v10 2402 still has issues...
entry.content:
Hi Pipalia1,

It is asking to refer to SAP Note 2128874.

Have you checked the SAP Note?

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hello Everyone! 

Excited to be part of this group!

entry.title: Re: The Future of Learning – Top 7 Predictions for 2030
entry.content:
The future of learning is likely to be shaped by several key trends and developments:

  1. Personalized Learning: Technology will enable more personalized learning experiences tailored to individual needs, preferences, and learning styles. Adaptive learning platforms, AI-driven tutors, and data analytics will help educators better understand and address each student's strengths and weaknesses.

  2. Online and Blended Learning: Online education will continue to grow, offering flexibility and accessibility to learners worldwide. Blended learning models, combining online and in-person instruction, will become more prevalent, allowing for a more dynamic and customizable educational experience.

  3. Skill-based and Lifelong Learning: With the rapid pace of technological change and evolving job markets, there will be an increased emphasis on acquiring practical skills and fostering a culture of lifelong learning. Education will shift from a focus on memorization to skill development, critical thinking, creativity, and adaptability.

  4. Collaborative and Experiential Learning: Collaboration, problem-solving, and hands-on experiences will play a central role in education. Project-based learning, internships, apprenticeships, and real-world applications of knowledge will be integrated into curricula to better prepare learners for the challenges of the future.

  5. Emergence of New Technologies: Virtual reality (VR), augmented reality (AR), artificial intelligence (AI), and gamification will revolutionize the learning experience, making it more immersive, engaging, and interactive. These technologies will enable simulations, virtual laboratories, and other innovative learning environments.

  6. Globalization and Cultural Exchange: Technology will facilitate global collaboration and cultural exchange, allowing learners to connect with peers and experts from around the world. This will foster cross-cultural understanding, empathy, and diverse perspectives, enriching the learning experience.

  7. Shift Towards Competency-based Education: Many education experts have suggested that traditional models of education based on fixed timelines and grades will give way to competency-based approaches, where advancement is determined by mastery of specific skills and knowledge. This will promote greater flexibility and individualized progression.

  8. Emphasis on Soft Skills and Emotional Intelligence: In addition to technical skills, there will be a growing recognition of the importance of soft skills such as communication, empathy, resilience, and emotional intelligence. Education will seek to cultivate these skills alongside academic knowledge.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
@HV920 nice to meet you in the community. I live in the US outside of Philadelphia. My role is in the SAP Community team. May I ask your areas of interest in the community? There are quite a few interest groups you may like to join.

Interest Groups | SAP Community

entry.title: Re: CAP-consuming on-premise OData service : read ECONNRESET error
entry.content:
Hello!

I encountered the exact same issue, and the only solution I found was through using "Storyboard". Instead of importing the .edmx file and configuring it, I simply added a new external resource via the storyboard visual tool (using the "Open Storyboard" command). This method unexpectedly listed all services and entities without any problems. Additionally, I configured the development destination by adding it to the "default-env.json".

This situation is peculiar because, beyond just listing services and entities, the curl test with the specified destination also worked. The SAP Knowledge Base Article 3112360 - 502 error connecting to backend OData from CAP project in BAS wasn't particularly helpful. Even after completing all the necessary configurations, I still had to use the "cds watch" command, otherwise I would have binding issues.

If you, or anyone else for that matter, discover another method to resolve this issue, please let me know.

Best regards,

Rafael

entry.title: Re: CAP-consuming on-premise OData service : read ECONNRESET error
entry.content:
Hello!

I encountered the exact same issue, and the only solution I found was through using "Storyboard". Instead of importing the .edmx file and configuring it, I simply added a new external resource via the storyboard visual tool (using the "Open Storyboard" command). This method unexpectedly listed all services and entities without any problems. Additionally, I configured the development destination by adding it to the "default-env.json".

This situation is peculiar because, beyond just listing services and entities, the curl test with the specified destination also worked. The SAP Knowledge Base Article 3112360 - 502 error connecting to backend OData from CAP project in BAS wasn't particularly helpful. Even after completing all the necessary configurations, I still had to use the "cds watch" command, otherwise I would have binding issues.

If you, or anyone else for that matter, discover another method to resolve this issue, please let me know.

Best regards,

Rafael

entry.title: Re: Print Crystal PDF using Service Layer
entry.content:
Hi Mari_Ma,

ExportPDF is there for API Gateway not for Service Layer.

API Gateway will allow you to convert the crystal layouts to PDF and normally running on ports 60000 or 60020.

Refer to this link: About SAP Business One API Gateway 

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Substitutions in SAP FI
entry.content: If I'm not wrong, there's one substitution program generated for each client, you must run the program RGUGBR00 in each client to generate the substitution program. Search RGUGBR00 in the forum to get more information about it.

entry.title: Re: Four days with the next generation
entry.content:
It's truly remarkable to see how effortlessly these young individuals embrace technology, even to the point of creating viable products in a sleep-deprived state. The events described highlight not just technical skills, but also creativity, adaptability, and collaborative spirit among participants.

Moreover, your reflection on the future implications of this tech-savvy generation is thought-provoking. Indeed, as these individuals enter the workforce and bring their innate understanding of user experience and design principles, we can anticipate a wave of innovation that surpasses anything we've seen before even by some of the current leaders on innovation.

It's inspiring to witness the potential of these young minds, and it's a testament to the importance of nurturing and supporting programs like the Innojam and the Festival of Code. As we move forward, embracing and harnessing the talents of this generation will undoubtedly shape the landscape of technology and innovation for years to come.

entry.title: Characters that have hexadecimal display between HEX00 and HEX1F are not permitted
entry.content:
All,

We have created a virtual info provider based on a Hana view of the ACDOCA table in Simple Finance.  We then have a Bex query on that virtual provider to display data.  A text field ,"SGTXT" - Document Line Item Text,  on the ACDOCA table is included in the expressed characteristics, but returns the "Characters between HEX00 and HEX1F are not allowed" error when displaying.  Since this is the Universal Journal, repopulating this field is not an option - is there a way, perhaps through the use of an exit variable to over come this display error?  In creating the BW characteristic for this Hana field, you have the ability to specify a Conversion Routine - could you code a conversion routine to say HEX00 display as ' ' or some other allow character?

entry.title: Re: Converting Existing Documents to PDF Using SAP Busine...
entry.content:
Hi jun_dolor,

We are not aware about any entity or API in Service Layer which will allow you to do so.

You should use API Gateway instead.

API Gateway will allow you to convert the crystal layouts to PDF and normally running on ports 60000 or 60020.

Refer to this link: About SAP Business One API Gateway 

Hope it helps!

 

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Error M7044 posting goos issue (VL02N) - valuation type
entry.content: Hi, Can you resolved this error?

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch mit Dominic Beckbauer (CPI Helper) (hybrid)
entry.content:
Liebe Stammtischschwestern und -brüder,

Wir treffen uns am Donnerstag, den 11.4., zum SAP Stammtisch. Lasst uns in schönem gemütlichen Ambiente zum Thema SAP und drumherum austauschen.

Um ca. 18:30 Uhr haben wir einen kurzen Vortrag zum OpenSource Addon SAP CPI Helper von Dominic Beckbauer.

Wir treffen uns dieses Mal in den Räumlichkeiten bei SAP in der Nymphenburger Str. 82.

Bitte haltet eure Zu- und Absage aktuell, damit wir die richtige Personenzahl für unsere Planung haben. Für die Anmeldung bei SAP benötigen wir zusätzlich auch eine Emailadresse.

Wir freuen uns auf Euer kommen und einen regen Austausch!

SAP Stammtisch Orga Team

PS: Die Veranstaltung ist "hybrid", d.h. ihr werdet auch online über einen Link dem Vortrag beiwohnen können.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Good day,

My name is Dominque and work from the Netherlands. 

I'm hoping to upgrade my skills. 

Please all have a great day ahead.

entry.title: Re: Can we mass upload the Locations?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have done using LSMW, but it is a time consuming one also. 

Regards

Terence

entry.title: No product is displayed in "My Purchased Products" inside SAP for Me
entry.content:
Some customers are reporting that the product they purchased is not appearing under "My Purchased Products" in SAP for Me. Upon navigating to Portfolio & Products > My Product Portfolio > Product Summary, no product is displayed.

Despite the contract start date passing over a week ago, the Super Admin, the sole user with platform access, cannot see the "SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud" product in this section.

Do you know what could be causing this issue?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: 1c37fc02469f6181c37fc02469f618d64dbcc9502cfea5030cc070fd27875b9f102037238c49f08d64dbcc9502cfea5030cc070fd27875b9f102037238c49f08

entry.title: Re: Unable to run a query with secondary database in capm
entry.content: Try the new @cap-js/hana. It does not have the issue of shared pool between services. But, it is still not released for production.

entry.title: QR codes in SAP Business One 10.0
entry.content:
Dear All,

First post, hope all goes well 🤔

I have a question in relation to the use of a QR scanner in SBO.

I’m working on a project to integrate standard maintenance jobs from our workshop into SBO. In our workflow, we use the Item Master Data to create an item number for each work task. With this item number, we then have predefined text and component description nicely in our quotation.

While implementing, it came to notice that the Sales Data tab has a box called “CREATE QR CODE FROM”. I am not sure into what extend our license foresees into the functionality of the program, but got curious if this function would be usable for us and importantly how can we get this working for us.

Let’s say that I create the QR codes on each work task. Would it then be possible to open/start a sales quotation, scan the QR code and have it in our quotation? Besides functionality, what are further requirements?

We are working in SAP Business One 10.0

Look forward on your feedback.

Dominique

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
@MioYasutake 

 

Hi, 

Have you had any issues binding an Odata service to the view in any of your use cases? We are seeing instances where the Odata call to the BE service isn't getting triggered. We are following normal UI5 practices. We are able to create a quick UI5 app and this service works just fine, it's just for this Ui Task app that it appears to not follow the same rules.

entry.title: Partitioning based on Change Number Range
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am working with Signavio Process Intelligence extracting data from SAP. The problem I am facing is that when I tried to extract the CDPOS table in advanced mode with this code (documentation):

tableSyncConfigurations:
alias: cdpos
sql: |
SELECT
CONCAT(MANDANT, OBJECTCLAS, OBJECTID, CHANGENR, TABNAME, TABKEY, FNAME, CHNGIND) AS c_key,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS c_fetchdate,
MANDANT,
OBJECTCLAS,
OBJECTID,
CHANGENR,
TABNAME,
TABKEY,
FNAME,
CHNGIND,
VALUE_NEW
FROM CDPOS
WHERE CHANGENR >= :changenr AND CHANGENR <= :max_changenr
keyColumn: c_key
mostRecentRowColumn: c_fetchdate
parameters:
- name: changenr
initial: '0000000001'
idformat: '%010d'
pagesize: 100000
type: id

It was bringing me 0 rows/records. I do not understand where I have to define the max_changenr value, because when I removed that variable and directly put the values from one changenr to another there if it worked.

I appreciate your help, greetings.

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch München zu Besuch bei AWS (Mai 2024)
entry.content:
Liebe Stammtischschwestern und -brüder,

Wir treffen uns diesen Monat ausnahmsweise am Dienstag, den 6.5., zum SAP Stammtisch. Lasst uns in schönem gemütlichen Ambiente zum Thema SAP und drumherum austauschen.

Dieses Mal sind wir in die Räumlichkeiten von AWS am Oskar-von-Miller-Ring 20 eingeladen. Unsere Agenda dort:

  • Introduction Stefan Höchbauer (VP AWS DACH) oder Florian Böhme (Account Director SAP)
  • Präsentation ABAP SDK und Amazon GenAI für SAP inkl. Demos
  • Tour AWS Experience Center showroom
  • Happy Hour mit Pizza und Getränken

Bitte haltet eure Zu- und Absage aktuell, damit wir die richtige Personenzahl für unsere Planung haben. Für die Anmeldung bei AWS benötigen wir zusätzlich auch eine Emailadresse.

Wir freuen uns auf Euer kommen und einen regen Austausch!

SAP Stammtisch Orga Team

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
@Mark112358 
I haven't tried connecting to OData service within a task UI, but in order to access backend services you need to add configurations in the wrapper's ui5.yaml as below:

https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sap/ux-ui5-tooling#connecting-to-a-back-end-system-with-destination

- name: fiori-tools-proxy
  afterMiddleware: compression
  configuration:
    backend:
    - path: /sap
      url: https://my.backend.com:1234
      destination: my_backend

Additionally, from the code you presented, OData model is already defined in the manifest.json ( I'm guessing that the mainService is used by the default model ). Therefore, no need to create another model in the onInit method.

entry.title: Canada GST/RITC Return under SAP DRC ON PREM
entry.content:
Hi Experts

We are implementing SAP DRC for several countries which include Canada. Currently Tax determination is being taken care by Tax Engine onesource, which doesn't require tax jurisdiction to be maintained in SAP S4.  However As per SAP Support it says for Canada returns tax jurisdiction is mandatory. Does anyone know how can DRC be used for Canada with Tax engine Onesource which doesn't require Jurisdiction codes?

entry.title: Re: Revision and MAT filed is not showing in Notification...
entry.content:
Dears,

I have exactly the same error, in IW28 the menu NOTIFICATION -> ASSIGN REVISION is available but doesn't do anything, no error, no next steps, nothing. The SFW5 EA-PLM is active and OIAL Revision field is in Input.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Prefilling Fields When Creating a New Entity with CAP Node.js
entry.content:
@Cmdd 

Thanks for your comment ! 

Unfortunately, I haven't seen the usage of 'many $self' in contexts other than this particular use case. For your requirement, I would suggest trying InvocationGrouping: ChangeSet. However, based on your post, it seems this approach didn't work either, correct?

entry.title: Re: Single Sign On ( SSO) Configuration For Hana DB Using Kerberos
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have followed all the steps from below notes.

1813724 - HANA SSO/Kerberos: create keytab and validate conf and verify if the key tab has been set up properly.

SAP Note 1837331 – HowTo configure Kerberos SSO to SAP HANA DB using Microsoft Windows Active Directory

For testing we have used rc4 algorithm as recommended in the guide. Using the python script for HANA 2.0 , we were able to create and validate the Kerberos Keytab directly on the HANA server. Using hdbsql we can connect to SSO using the \c option when using the HANA service user which we used in prior steps for setting SPN etc. 

However, once we add the external alias to hana studio user ID, and when trying to test with the test user in AD (with external alias mapped in HDB studio for the hana user), it's not able to sso into the DB.

For example.

kinit aduser1@MYDOMAIN.COM

will work, but when trying the next step.

hdbsql -i <Instance> –n myhdbserver.mydomain.com

followed by \c

it's prompts for username again, which tells me it's reading the kerberos config file for AD authentication, but is unable to pass the ticket all the way up to the DB.

Any ideas or if anyone can share a similar experience ?

Thanks,

Akshay Pandit

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content:
My submission for task 1.

927b4a90d03c5e375607cbe3a3d385e554a32ebf20343c85d65ee9b96444049f

entry.title: SQL LTRIM version?
entry.content:
Hi all,

(We are running SAP_BASIS 750 0024 / SAP_ABA 750 0024.)

I’m trying to use the SQL LTRIM function to strip a particular character (0) in a WHERE clause but, although that the help function seems to suggest that this version of the function (LTRIM( expr,char )) is available, I get an error when trying to activate the program (And, of course, the editor shows anything after EXPR in red (comma (,) and char) ).

Any ideas?

TIA,

Luis

** As suggested by TuncayKaraca, the relevant code is something like this:

SELECT SINGLE saldo FROM zfihistmed
  WHERE laufd = @p_laufd
    AND laufi = @p_laufi
    AND zzcodmedp = @zzcodmedp
    AND belnrp = ltrim(@factura, '0')
  INTO data(prueba).

The editor shows LTRIM as an error:

and if I try to activate the program I get an error that, loosely translated, states that "the column "LTRIM(BELNRP" is unknown". This happens even if I remove the ", '0'" option.

Even so, I have the following help text:

entry.title: Integrate C4P-Resource Management with SAP Analytics Cloud or SAP DataSphere
entry.content:
Summary

Embarking on the journey of leveraging SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Projects, Resource Management (C4P), this blog simplifies the process of accessing its APIs, with a focus on the Resource Request functionality. Beginning with preparations, where we gather key information like API URL and credentials, we then explore the capabilities of the Resource Request API in the Business Accelerator Hub. We break down how to find the right URL for accessing resource requests and demonstrate how to connect these APIs to tools like SAP Analytics Cloud or SAP DataSphere. By following these steps, users can seamlessly integrate data from C4P into their analytics workflow, enabling better decision-making and operational efficiency.

Preparation Step:

You have to Set Up the API Access for for SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Projects, Resource Management

And at step 7 of Creating a Service Key, please note down all of the information mentioned in the table below. We will use them to fill in the connection information in either SAP Analytics Cloud or SAP DataSphere later.

For example:

 

 

{
    "apiUrl": https://resource-management-api-projectscloud.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com,
    "uaa": {
        "clientid": "sb-............................................................265",
        "clientsecret": "49...............................................................vc=",
        "url": https://cp..........w.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com,
        "identityzone": "cp..........w",

 

 

apiUrl: is the main part of the OData Service URL and we will add path to this URL in the later step.

clientid: is OAuth Client ID in SAC OData Service Connection dialog

clientsecret: is Secret in SAC OData Service Connection dialog

url: is the base of token URL. The full token URL should be: 

 

 

https://cp..............w.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token

 

 

In Business Accelerator Hub, you will see four cards. Each of them contains a collection of request methods based on OData API. However, only Assignment and Resource Request contain GET method. Project Experience and Workforce Availability don't support GET method. Hence, only queries from Assignment and Resource Request can be imported and consumed in SAP Analytics Cloud and DataSphere. And this blog will take the Resource Request OData API as an example.

Step1: Check API Reference and Capability

  1. Click on the card of Resource Request > Click on API Reference
  2. You will see the GET method is supported for Resource Request.

However, in the Workforce Availability. Only POST method is supported. This is the reason that we are not able to leverage this endpoint in the Analysis Application

Step2: Find OData Service URL for Resource Request

  1. Click on the card of Resource Request > Click on Try Out
  2. Select /ResourceRequests from the method section > click on Environment: Sandbox > Select Add New Environment
  3. In the prompt window > find Starting URL. By following the format, you can add the path of /ResourceRequestService/v1 to the end of the apiUrl which you noted down at the preparation step. For example, like the screenshot below. (In the same vein, the URL logic also applies to Assignment)

(This apiUrl will be used for connection later.)

Step3: Build Connection in SAC

Now, you have obtained all required the information. And you can build the OData Services Connection in SAP Analytics Cloud or SAP DataSphere. For example, like below screenshot. 

OData Service Connection supports scheduling import in SAP Analytics Cloud. You can leverage this feature to update the data in the model. 

Tips: 

  • If you have DataSphere, you can use DataSphere to restructure the query and then visualize the data in SAP Analytics Cloud.
  • If you find the data from one single query is not enough and you don't have DataSphere. You can leverage data blending feature in SAP Analytics Cloud to combine the data visualization from different sources.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
@Dominique28 great to meet you in the community. I live in the US outside of Philadelphia. My role is in SAP Community. May I ask your areas of interest? Be sure to join the groups that interest you.

Interest Groups | SAP Community

entry.title: Re: SQL LTRIM version?
entry.content: Hi Luis, it would be beneficial if you share your code snippet including LTRIM.

entry.title: Authenticating Users in The Power Platform (Entra ID) with SAP using X.509 Certificates
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently in the process of drafting an internal proposal to introduce X.509 SSO functionality to the SAP ERP Connector within Power Platform (Apps & Automate), and I've managed to get the following Proof of Concept up and running.

However, I've hit a bit of a snag at step 2 of the process. As it stands, I manually generate the client certificate for my user (authtest01) without a clear understanding of how this step would fit into typical enterprise environment. It's my understanding that most large organizations have a PKI in place capable of issuing these types of certificates. My question to the community is: how can I, in a practical manner, retrieve these certificates on behalf of my users to facilitate their authentication with SAP? Would it be an okay assumption that the certificates would be available in a customer's Azure Key Vault? Or would they possibly be exposed on a claim for the user in Entra ID?

Here is how I first envisioned it working, however was told by a previous SAP expert that assuming companies would put their customers certs into Azure Key Vault might be a stray assumption. Thus, I wanted to check in here with the community.

I'd really appreciate any insights, advice, or suggestions you could offer to help refine this aspect of the SAP ERP connector for the Power Platform. Your input will be invaluable in shaping its development.

Diagrams:
Power Automate access SAP via X.509 Certificate Mermaid Sequence Diagram
Power Automate with Auth to Entra ID access SAP via X.509 Certificates Mermaid Sequence Diagram

entry.title: Re: How to check runtime CR 13 with SP 25 installed from...
entry.content: ok, but how to check bitness of runtime installed? For Example, If I detect my process run on 64 Bits, then, First I have to check if runtime 64 is installed. But How i know wich runtime is installed 32 o 64 bits?

entry.title: Re: Transgender Day Of Visibility - March 31st 2024
entry.content:
Thank you, Alix, for your thoughtful and insightful post. As a transgender woman, one thing I want to point out when we talk about the difference between coming out as LGB and the processes (physical/social/emotional) of transitioning as a transgender person. As you mention, LGB sexual identification is part of their truth. For transgender people, it is typically not a change in sexual identification that is being expressed, but our entire gender identification. This typically means that our appearance will look radically different to the world, we typically change our name because we can no longer live with our "dead" given name, our pronouns change, and our entire world perspective may shift as we are able to identify and run in spaces with people of our new gender identity, spaces where we were likely never welcomed before. I also want to point out the challenges for those who identify as non binary, as our cultures don't typically know where to include them.

Please don't take my comments as in any way minimizing the challenges and lack of acceptance that LGB identifying people face when coming out. The challenges are just different, and each person experiences them uniquely in their own way. 

I appreciate all the support I have received from SAP colleagues and Pride@SAP during my transition these past 4+ years.

BobbieBowser

entry.title: Re: E: No open quantity found for manufacturing order 1001049 /scwm/rf_en840
entry.content: Hi Jinoy,

entry.title: Re: Spotlight on Cybersource Payments and the Benefits of a Seamless Integration with SAP
entry.content: Do you have insight on integration specifically to Hana? How can you claim seamless integration with SAP and not be talking about both Commerce Cloud and Hana?

entry.title: Re: How to Write a blog
entry.content:
Hi, @jenifer_ranjani:

I see that my colleague Audrey Stevenson already responded to you: https://community.sap.com/t5/welcome-corner-blog-posts/welcome-all-sap-community-members-start-here/bc-p/13656305#M36618.

Please note that posting the same question in multiple places violates our Rules of Engagement (https://pages.community.sap.com/resources/rules-of-engagement). (See the section on cross-posting.) And it's generally considered poor etiquette to resurrect an older, closed question with a reply asking a new question. It's best just to post a new question and wait for one of us to get back to you.

Since you've already reached out to our inbox, one of my colleagues will be in touch to assist you.

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: Re: HANA Express Download links Broken

entry.title: Re: Converting C Code to Abap

"ABAP Connectivity" is about HTTP or RFC communication with an ABAP system. -- I don't see any network communication being used in the above example?!

entry.title: Re: concatenate bank Key and bank account in dmee tree sa...
entry.content: I was able to concatenate the bank Key and Bank Account number that are both structures. What I found was that I needed to create the Atoms for the Bank Key and Bank Account number below the Element with the attribute "own mapping", with Atom handling of 01.

entry.title: Re: S_DEVELOP and S_RFC Auth Objects
entry.content:
Hi

 

If you would like to know what those objects control, you can look up their documentation within your system for example via SUIM.

The definition of S_DEVELOP says:

General authorization object for objects in the ABAP Workbench.

Using this object, you can assign access authorizations for all workbench components.

  • ABAP Development Tools
  • ABAP Debugger and Trace Tools (for example, SE30, SAT)
  • ABAP Dump Analysis ( for example, ST22)
  • ABAP Dictionary and Data Modeler
  • Screen Painter and Menu Painter
  • Function Library
  • Object Navigator and Info System
  • SAP Smart Forms
  • Form Builder
  • Enhancements
  • Switch Framework

 

Definition of S_RFC says:
Authorization check for RFC access to program modules (for example, a function group or function modules) on the basis of a whitelist.

 

br

Roland

entry.title: Re: How to use CDS View in Calculation View?
entry.content:
An addition to Cocquerel-s answer is the note:

2511210 - Access to ABAP-Managed Database Objects

which in summary says, not to consume an ABAP CDS view directly on the database. These should be consumed always through the ABAP application server.

entry.title: Re: How to execute a native sql query from abap program o...
entry.content:
Some examples that you could do:

  • Use EXEC SQL: https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_750_index_htm/7.50/en-US/abapexec.htm
  • Use an AMDP class: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_750/6811c09434084fd1bc4f40e66913ce11/3e7ce62892d243eca44499d3f5a54bff.html?locale=en-US
  • Embed the HANA CV into an HCPR and use the RSDRI_INFOPROV_READ: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/bwplaolap/3361383473.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Customer LTSD Issue failing for certain countries
entry.content:
Team,

We implemented the Preference Processing module to be specific the Outbound customer C-LTSD's. We are facing an issue with issuing the LTSD's for two countries SouthKorea(KR) and Serbia. Any LTSD's for Invoices belonging to these two countries, the system is failing to issue the C-LTSD's. We noticed that when creating billing document for Customers from these two countries in the feeder system, the same is not transferring to GTS. In SLG1 we can see the transfer failing with the error - 'Legal Regulation is not Unique'. Message no. /SAPSLL/API_INBOUND060. Diagnosis details of the message says "The legal regulation cannot be determined uniquely for country key DK. Multiple legal regulations are active for country key DK and service of type Customs Processing". However manually transferring the document again via GTS cockpit (/SAPSLL/SD0C_RIMAR3) will transfer the billing document to GTS system and the same is visible in table ‘/SAPSLL/PREBDOC’, my understanding is this is the table from where the billing docs are picked for issuing the LTSD's. But ultimately when issuing the C-LTSD (Tcode - /SAPSLL/LTSDOUT_1) the program fails to issue ..its says '0 LTSDs were created', also the corresponding entry gets deleted from the table ‘/SAPSLL/PREBDOC’. This is a very strange behaviour. Please note that the issue is only faced with Invoices for only countries south Korea and Serbia, rest all countries the system is working as expected. Attached a snapshot of the error in Billing doc transfer. 

Any pointers to solve this issue is highly appreciated. Please note I already  check where there are any multiple country assignments for the Legal Regulations, but did not find any, so that cause can be ruled out. 

 

Thanks,

Dhan

entry.title: Re: In a multi-app CAP project, how can I trigger navigat...
entry.content:
I have been playing with Joule:  https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-code-test-drive.html. I created a custom action, then asked it this:

Write me a custom action implementation that calls action transfer then navigates to the Products application

It wrote this:

It

 let sActionName = "loyaltyProgram.Purchases.transfer";
            let mParameters = {
                contexts: oEvent.getSource().getBindingContext(),
                model: oEvent.getSource().getModel(),
                label: 'Confirm',    
                invocationGrouping: true     
            };
            this.editFlow.invokeAction(sActionName, mParameters) //SAP Fiori elements EditFlow API
            .then(function() {
                // After the action is successfully executed, navigate to the Customer application
                var oCrossAppNavigator = Container.getService("CrossApplicationNavigation");
                oCrossAppNavigator.toExternal({
                    target: { semanticObject : "mynewprojectCustomer", action : "display" }
                });
            })
            .catch(function(oError) {
                // Handle error
                MessageToast.show("Error executing action: " + oError.message);
            });

Also, are there any differences from the installation process described in this blog if we were to use the standalone abapGit (or for any other reason)?

Thanks,
Scott

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One V10 SQL API
entry.content: I have a public IP but cannot access https://PUBLICIP:50000. Is there a different setting that I need to check?

entry.title: Re: SQL LTRIM version?
entry.content:
Hi Luis,

SELECT SINGLE saldo FROM zfihistmed
WHERE laufd = @p_laufd
AND laufi = @p_laufi
AND zzcodmedp = @zzcodmedp
AND belnrp = ltrim(belnrp, '0')
INTO data(prueba).

If you get  "LTRIM(BELNRP" is unknown" error for the code above. Question: What is belnrp? Is it a variable, parameter? As you gave in other example's AND belnrp = ltrim(@factura, '0')  --- belnrp should be used like  AND belnrp = ltrim(@belnrp, '0') and it should be either a variable or a parameter, etc. 

Regards,
Tuncay

Is there any way to get the hierarchy level value whenever I try to expand the node. I can get it in the first time but further I only get parentid.

Thanks

entry.title: SuccessFactors Recruiting Posting Subject Matter Expert Office Hours (French/English)
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the ‘Will you be attending?’ option will NOT register you for the event.

To register for this event, please click here: Registration details can be found with our full schedule here (Authentication Required)

Please join us for our Recruiting Posting Subject Matter Expert office hours!

If you have questions about your SuccessFactors Recruiting Posting product regarding best practices, use cases, 'how to' questions, etc. then please join our call and we'll have our expert answer your question live.

These sessions are held in an open online forum with other customers participating. There is no pre-planned content or presentation. Time is spent answering the questions you bring to the call. No advance registration required.


Note: Attendees can use the in-system audio and have the system call you directly or attendees can call in manually. To locate the call-in number for your region along with the passcode, please click on the information dropdown in the upper right corner of the meeting (indicated by an italicized i in a circle icon).

entry.title: How to solve Warehouse order not intended for &2" Message No. /SCWM/RF_DE047
entry.content:
Hi all,

as we are implementing RF scanners we get issues during puttaway. We can do GR and create WT, but during puttaway, we can't continue. We are working with SALL which should be able to do all tasks. 

Queues are created based on 3WO and the resource is assigned. Did you experience a similar issue in the public cloud? 

Thank you for your ideas

entry.title: How to add inner join association to an extended cds view
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have extended a standard CDS view of standard application WBS Element Overview. We are trying  to add restriction to  Project Managers and Delegates (maintained in a custom table) to view only the ones assigned to them. There is a table function which take session user as input and return a required resultset . 

Is there a way we can add an inner join to this TF in the extended view ? My understanding is we can only add association( which is also Left Outer join) and not inner joins in extended view? Any workaround  ?

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Release 2024.07
entry.content:
SAP Analytics Cloud brings together analytics and planning with unique integration to SAP applications and seamless access to heterogenous data sources. It helps everyone in your organization make decisions without doubt with trusted insights and integrated plans.

This blog post introduces the features of the SAP Analytics Cloud 2024.07 release available for SAP Analytics Cloud FastTrack customers. For SAP Analytics Cloud Quarterly Release Cycle (QRC) customers, this release and its features will be available as part of the QRC Q2 2024 release. View the QRC release schedule here.

 

System Administration and Technical Requirements

 

Although not required, you may upgrade to the latest SAP Analytics Cloud agent version 1.0.399 to take advantage of all data acquisition types.

The agent’s minimum version remains at 1.0.75, with the following exceptions:

  • Version 1.0.99 for SAP ERP/SQL Database
  • Version 1.0.365 for SAP universe (UNX). The SAP Analytics Cloud agent requires additional setup steps, for more details see SAP Note 3262098
  • Version 1.0.353 for SAP Business Warehouse (BW)
  • Version 1.0.235 for SAP HANA View
  • Version 1.0.248 for File Server

For more information, see System Requirements and Technical Prerequisites.

Regarding supported features and required updates for the integration of SAP BW with SAP Analytics Cloud, refer to SAP Note 2541557 for further details.

Regarding supported features and required updates for live universe access through SAP BusinessObjects Live Data Connect with SAP Analytics Cloud, refer to SAP Note 2771921 for further details.

Please download the latest version of the Simple Deployment Kit from Service Marketplace.

Note: To avoid downloading older versions and potentially exposing users to a vulnerable bundling of the Cloud Connector with SAPJVM, or Apache Tomcat, only the three latest versions of the kits are available to download.

For Cloud agent version change management details, refer to SAP Note 3264839.

 

Release Highlights

  • Administration and Service Management
    • Enforce Purpose and Grant type by OAuth Client
  • Augmented Analytics
    • Just Ask
      • Just Ask administrators can now assign Labels to searchable models
  • Data Exploration
    • Calculations dialog: Syntax highlighting
    • Filter in the filter line on calculated measures
    • Embedded Dialog Story Filter Panel
    • Builder panel enhancements
  • Enterprise Planning
    • Data Actions – Select 'Show Only Leaves' in Tracing table | (SAP Road Map Explorer)
    • Global Settings for Calendar Notifications | (SAP Road Map Explorer)
    • Multi Action Predictive step support prediction interval | (SAP Road Map Explorer)
    • Dynamic extension of planning area during data entry
  • Microsoft Office Integration
    • Prompt Enhancements
    • Refresh Selected Functions
  • Story Design
    • Filter by member dialog – improved value selection experience | (SAP Road Map Explorer)
    • Rank with Others for Charts | (SAP Road Map Explorer)
    • Support dynamic font size scaling | (SAP Road Map Explorer)
    • Enable batch export when exporting your story to PDF or PPTX | (SAP Road Map Explorer)
    • Totals as an anchor or operand for client calculations.
    • Numeric Values full precision
    • Warn Customers on Deprecation of Classic Design Experience
  • Story Extensibility
    • Composites: Data source Repointing | (SAP Road Map Explorer)
    • Custom Widget Support for Universal Model | (SAP Road Map Explorer)
    • Section Widget Feature Gaps
    • CSV and Excel Export Support for UQM Table
  • Story Presentation
    • Unified Story Presentation Mode | (SAP Road Map Explorer)

 

Administration and Service Management

 

Enforce Purpose and Grant type by OAuth Client

When adding a new OAuth client to a tenant hosted on a non-SAP data center, the dialog now provides separate options for Interactive Access and API Access. The authorization grant type must be configured, and will be enforced by the OAuth client.

 

Augmented Analytics

 

Just Ask

 

Assign Labels to searchable models

Just Ask administrators can now assign Labels to searchable models. In addition to model names, users will be able to see the category, such as marketing, sales, forecasting and more. This additional information will provide users with a more comprehensive overview, making it easier to select the models that best suit their needs.

 

Data Exploration

 

Calculations dialog: Syntax highlighting

As a user of the Calculated Measures dialog in data analyzer you can now find syntax highlighting in the formula editor. This adds clarity to the formula you create by differentiating objects like measures and functions, etc.

 

Filter in the filter line on calculated measures

In data analyzer you can now filter in the filter line on calculated measures you’ve created. After having created the calculated measures, they appear instantly in the list of measure options in the filter line.

 

Embedded Dialog Story Filter Panel

We have made enhancements to the accessibility, functionality, and layout of the embedded dialog story filter panel.

  • The new UI5 component – Multi Input is used for the multi select. 
  • The single select now appears as editable text in the input field.
  • Variable header title removed as duplication.
  • Error handling added for mandatory variables. Asterisk indicator no longer displayed as header title removed.

 

Builder panel enhancements

We’ve made the following builder panel enhancements:

  • The builder panel in table now displays the hierarchy structure (available objects list)
  • The sort context menu in available objects is now available for each individual structure
  • We introduced a splitter in builder panel for user to adjust its panel area

 

Enterprise Planning

 

Data Actions – Select 'Show Only Leaves' in Tracing table 

When checking data changes in the analytic window during data action tracing, users can now enable ‘Show Only Leaves’ from the context menu of each dimension to show only its leaf members. (SAP Road Map Explorer)

 

Global Settings for Calendar Notifications

Administrators can now configure which in-app notifications or emails are sent to users who are involved in calendar events. Settings can be defined depending on the users’ roles (owners, assignees/reviewers, or viewers). (SAP Road Map Explorer)

 

Multi Action Predictive step support prediction interval 

In the predictive step of multi actions, when you choose either the Train & Forecast or Apply predictive action, you can now save a prediction interval by choosing a prediction interval minimum and a prediction interval maximum. Using this feature allows you to visualize the prediction quality. (SAP Road Map Explorer)

 

Dynamic extension of planning area during data entry

When you auto-generate a planning area based on table context, the planning area will now dynamically expand as you work on a version that’s in public edit mode. This will minimize the size of the planning area and only extend it when needed. Additionally, we’ve made an enhancement to allow for undo/redo extension actions in the version management history.

 

Microsoft Office Integration

 

SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel

 

Prompt Enhancements

Users can now search for variables in the set variables dialog. Additionally, there are two new settings to specify the display of the variables in the dialog:

  • Show mandatory variables only to show only the variables in the dialog that are mandatory to be set.
  • Show variable technical names to show the technical names / IDs of the variables in the dialog.

This feature is available to all customers as of March 27, 2024.

 

Refresh Selected Functions

Users now have the option to refresh a subset of the functions available in your workbook. To do so, select the functions you want to refresh and choose Refresh > Refresh Selected Functions in the ribbon.

This feature is available to all customers as of March 27, 2024.

 

Story Design

 

Filter by member dialog – improved value selection experience

The filter by member dialog has been re-designed and provides the following updates: (SAP Road Map Explorer).

User interface enhancements:

  • Improved UI architecture: The UI layout of the member selector provides direct access to the essential actions & settings, such as the search field and the hierarchy selection. Other settings, like read mode or text presentation, have been moved into a settings panel that can be opened on demand. The multi-column presentation of the selectable members allows for better readability.

 

  • Increased scrolling: The new member selector implements a lazy loading mechanism based on the UX pattern "infinite scrolling" which applies to the list of selectable members as well as the list of member selections: as you scroll down, members are automatically and continuously loaded at the bottom.

 

  • Increased flexibility: The dialog box can now be resized, and can be dragged to a different position. The panels are also resizable, and the content of the panels are fully responsive.

 

  • Search hits highlighting: The new member selector bolds each part of a member label that matches the search criteria.

New functional capabilities:

  • Enhanced member exclusion paradigm: The new member selector introduces an advanced paradigm for member exclusion: it allows you to deselect one or more descendants of a selected node. For example, select the country “USA” but explicitly exclude the state “Florida”. This selection is dynamic, which means that if, in the data source, a new state is registered under the country “USA”, it is implicitly part of the selection.

  • Enhanced search capabilities: The new member selector supports the wildcard search, specifically the wildcard character “*” which replaces zero or more characters.

Read more about the improved filter member experience in this blog post by @arnoklein.

 

Rank with Others for Charts 

We will support an option for the Story Designer and Story Viewer to define a rank with others. It will be supported for: (SAP Road Map Explorer)

  • Charts with Flat Dimension(s)
  • Charts with Measures with Base Aggregation
  • Define a Rank with Others on Multiple Axes

Others can be placed last (Top N) or first (Bottom N):

  • It can be renamed
  • We will NOT allow you to expand the others node or interact with it (i.e. Linked Analysis, Filter, Exclude, and so on)

 

Support dynamic font size scaling 

As a story designer in Optimized Story Experience, you can select Font Scaling under Tools in the toolbar to set font scale for responsive pages or individual widgets for specific devices, so that the font sizes in your story are dynamically adapted to different devices. (SAP Road Map Explorer)

 

Enable batch export when exporting your story to PDF or PPTX

In the optimized story experience, it is now possible to enable batch export when exporting a story to PDF or PPTX, so that the story can be exported based on each selected dimension member filter value. Only dimension filter is supported. And the settings of Batch Export aren't available unless the story has a compatible story filter. (SAP Road Map Explorer)

As a story developer, you can use APIs to configure, enable batch export:

  • Add the settings of Batch Export in both "Export to PDF" and "Export to PowerPoint" technical components in design time;
  • Add APIs for both "Export to PDF" and "Export to PowerPoint" technical components with value helper support to set batch export properties (incl. batch export enablement, story filter selection, filter value selection).

 

Allow using Totals as an anchor and operand of FECs

In tables, the designer (and with limitations the viewer) can create client calculations aka frontend calculations (FEC). The new feature allows:

  • Using an existing ‘Totals’ cell as an anchor
  • Using an existing ‘Totals’ cells as an operand in the calculation

This allows for example to calculate fractions one member contributes to totals. In the case of BW comments, it also allows showing the comments on a total value.

 

Numeric Values full precision

In the optimized story experience, the displayed numeric values (and decimal places) will be based on the full precision (non-rounded) source value: this improves the precision of planning workflow using these numbers. Some numbers may not be displayed as expected and will require additional formatting.

Client processing is limited to the Java Script standard precision of decimals which is around 15.

 

Warn Customers on Deprecation of Classic Design Experience

There is now a banner to warn Story and App Designers (it is not exposed in View Mode) that the Classic Experience is going away, and it is recommended to move content to the Optimized Experience.

There will be no impact to existing workflows. Users can still create, edit, duplication, and import Stories and Analytic Applications in the Classic Experience.

 

Story Extensibility

 

Composites: Data source Repointing

As a story designer in Optimized Story Experience, after adding a composite to your story, you can replace its model or objects in use without replacing the model, such as dimensions and measures. (SAP Road Map Explorer)

In Story design time, add a Composite data source panel which is opened via a context menu item to: 

  • List all data sources used in this composite widget in tokens
  • Replace or update a specific data source by clicking the token

 

Custom Widget Support for Universal Model

As a story designer in Optimized Story Experience, your custom widget can now consume Universal Account Model. There is support for models with measures and an account dimension, and Model with measures and no account dimension. (SAP Road Map Explorer)

When a model includes both measures and an account dimension, the API DataBinding.getMembers, DataBinding.addMemberToFeed and DataBinding.removeMember functions only apply to the account dimension. Therefore, it's impossible to manipulate measure feeding with the Custom Builder Panel.

 

Section Widget Feature Gaps

As a story designer in Optimized Story Experience, you can now use Section widget to improve the layout of your stories and break down your analysis per dimension member.

This closes feature gaps with the classic story. Restrictions in the classic story are still application in the optimized story experience.

 

CSV and Excel Export Support for UQM Table

In the lite viewer of the optimized story experience, in addition to Point of View, you can now select All as the scope to export all the data of a table to an XLSX or CSV file.

 

Story Presentation

 

Unified Story Presentation Mode

The Presentation Mode aims to bring the main features that are available with the traditional Digital Boardroom directly into the Optimized Experience. These include: (SAP Road Map Explorer)

  • Import of Story Pages: it allows a Designer to re-use content as their own. There is an option to re-import the page when we detect there has been an update
  • Building a Presentation Structure: it can be flat (by default) or configure a tree structure with Topics and Subtopics
  • Customizing the Presentation Mode Experience: option to configure the Toolbar, Default Viewer, and Navigation Panel State
  • Present Mode: brand new Present Mode with a simplified toolbar (if configured) and side panel navigation

Lite Viewer for Present Mode is supported for Flat Presentations. NOTE the same limitations for Lite Viewer still apply and will cause a re-direct to the Full Viewer.

Learn more about Unified Story Presentation Mode in this blog post by @Tunir.

 

This blog post only provides a high-level overview of the latest features and enhancements of SAP Analytics Cloud. You can find more details on these features in your In-App Help Guide for FastTrack customers and see this SAP Knowledge Base Article if you’d like to learn more about FastTrack and Quarterly Release Cycle releases. 

If you have any questions regarding the content in this blog post, you can comment below. If you have product specific or technical questions, post a question to our SAP Analytics Cloud Questions & Answers forum. Visit our SAP Analytics Cloud Community pages to find more product information, best practices, and more. And check out our SAP Road Map Explorer to see more upcoming features of SAP Analytics Cloud.

entry.title: Lot trace and Inspection Lots
entry.content:
Hello,

Can someone confirm / explain / provide clarity on what SAP is reading when there are multiple inspection lots for one batch. I have an instance with a batch that has multiple inspection lots (one that was released with UD of A, and a new one later created to quarantine partial inventory that is still open). During a usage decision of a material that had consumed this batch, the lot trace came stating the batch was still open, even though at the time of consumption, the batch was under the inspection lot that was released. 

Appreciate anyone's technical break down of how SAP's background job when there are multiple inspection lots!

entry.title: How to mass upload planned prices (future) in costing 2 view for materials?
entry.content: I have a requirement where the business wants to upload planned price (future) in costing 2 view of material master in mass. Are there any standard upload template or t-code available or do we need to upload it via LSMW / BDC? I have checked MM17 and MASS t-codes but planned price field is not available to upload in mass in these t-codes.

entry.title: SAP BTP TRIAL ABAP ENVIRONMENT ISSUES
entry.content:
SAP BTP TRIAL account creating ABAP environment via Booster or even creating abap environment trial 

manually  ,after logging in using browser window and then eclipse ADT gives the error

You were successfully authenticated, but an error occurred during the Service Instance logon. Please ensure that you have a user for the Service Instance

I searched sap community posts but none helped me ,can someone help me to resolve this ,as  I cannot ABAP cloud project using eclipse ADT at all

thanks 

rama anne
